c83c329d39.translation: All households currently have to transfer less money to the tax authorities and social insurance schemes than they did in 2000. And this despite the fact that nominal average wages have risen by almost twenty percent since then.

c83cd7d679.translation: I probably should have wrung my hands and had hysterical fits, but honestly I found the whole thing so stupid that I almost had to laugh.

c83e60a046.translation: According to the time, this miracle occurred approximately fifty days after the baptism; and since this took place at the beginning of the Jewish year or in the month of Tishrei, it was at the start of December 778 AD, fifty-two years after the founding of Rome, according to Dionysius's calendar.

c84f53264b.translation: The idea is, first, the connection between the Old and New Testaments, which Herder establishes as a philologist and historian — or rather, as a historical narrator and rhetorician — thereby turning the whole into a grand narrative that does not rely on divine revelation.

c85acf8a63.translation: At first, I still had a rough idea of which direction we were heading, but soon I completely lost my sense of orientation, which was not surprising given our speed, the fog, and my limited knowledge of London.

c85ebc7071.translation: In total, the Cowboys' outstanding defense forced seven turnovers, and if the offense had not also lost the ball once […] and if Efren Herrera had not missed three field goal attempts, then the Cowboys could have been leading more decisively than 13:0 at halftime.

c86dc6f38f.translation: Judaism and the Jewish communities from the rabbinic period differ no less from the Jewish communities (or Israelite, Judean, and Diaspora cultures) from which the Old Testament writings originated than Christianity and the Christian denominations from the time of the Church Fathers differ from the early Christian groups of the New Testament period.

[[Außerdem|adverbs/außerdem]] [[zeigen|verbs/zeigen#1]] sie [[starke|adjectives/stark#15]] Spuren der Vernachlässigung.“

c870cbdee6.translation: When I was seventeen years old, many people considered me a freak, both in my family and at school and in the neighborhood where I grew up in Baghdad.

c87714ed05.translation: Spring lets its blue ribbon flutter again through the skies, clouds drift over fields - all the poems are full of joy and longing for nature, and the pictures show a bright spring forest, colorful meadows, autumn leaves, and individual trees, a willow by the stream, a cherry tree with ripe red cherries, an autumnal yellow and orange flaming chestnut.

c87e1a2797.translation: A potential state, for example, would therefore be an absurdity, because the state designates a reality, while this is negated again by the addition of the potential.

c8e0b5a8f9.text: „Für Nomaden ist die Gastfreundschaft so wichtig wie ein gutes Zelt.“
c8e0b5a8f9.translation: For nomads, hospitality is as important as a good tent.

c8e1b49a5a.text: „"Die SPD will alte Industrien mit neuen ergänzen, während die Grünen für einen schnellen Schnitt und gezielte Förderung nachhaltiger Technologien sind", versuchte Fritz Kuhn etwas am Ruf des Ministers als grünen Vordenker zu kratzen.“ (übertragen)
c8e1b49a5a.translation: The SPD wants to complement old industries with new ones, while the Greens are in favor of a quick cut and targeted support of sustainable technologies," tried Fritz Kuhn to tarnish the reputation of the minister as a green pioneer.

c8e249f65d.text: „Es ist nicht leicht, eine Gruppe deutscher Rentner zufriedenzustellen, doch es ist überraschend aufregend, mit ihnen zu reisen.“
c8e249f65d.translation: It is not easy to satisfy a group of German retirees, but it is surprisingly exciting to travel with them.

c8e3234d8f.text: „Tatsächlich hat ihm Sophie La Roche von Plänen zur Gründung einer pädagogischen Akademie in Neuwied geschrieben, beim Grafen Friedrich Alexander zu Wied, und mit den Jacobis beredet er die Idee einer Verlagsbuchhandlung, beide Projekte kommen aber über das Planungsstadium nicht hinaus.“
c8e3234d8f.translation: In fact, Sophie La Roche wrote to him about plans to establish a pedagogical academy in Neuwied, with Count Friedrich Alexander zu Wied, and with the Jacobis he discussed the idea of a publishing house, but both projects never got beyond the planning stage.

c8e38a595a.text: Der Polizist gab mir das Zeichen, dass ich weiterfahren darf.
c8e38a595a.translation: The police officer gave me the signal that I am allowed to continue driving.

c8e44eb4a3.text: „Immer wieder ertrinken Flüchtlinge beim Kentern ihrer oftmals völlig überfüllten Schlauch- oder Holzboote.“
c8e44eb4a3.translation: Refugees keep drowning when their often completely overcrowded inflatable or wooden boats capsize.

c8e50e0ae8.text: „Appetithappen statt Gewissensbisse lautet das Motto. Denn wer gut isst, der läuft nicht unbedingt schneller - aber besser gelaunt.“
c8e50e0ae8.translation: Appetizer instead of guilt is the motto. Because those who eat well don't necessarily run faster — but they feel better.

c8e62496c0.text: wenn man euch den kleinen Finger reicht, nehmt ihr gleich die ganze Hand
c8e62496c0.translation: Give them an inch and they'll take a mile.

c8e735cb11.text: „Wahrscheinlicher ist es, dass auch die Selbstzensur derer herrschte, die «päpstlicher als der Papst» sein wollten.“
c8e735cb11.translation: It is more likely that even self-censorship was practiced by those who wanted to be "more papal than the pope."

c8e776a281.text: Chicago liegt am Südwestufer des Michigansees.
c8e776a281.translation: Chicago lies on the southwestern shore of Lake Michigan.

c8e7bc5159.text: Nun die Schraube mit dem Schraubenzieher in den Dübel schrauben.
c8e7bc5159.translation: Now, screw the screw into the wall plug with the screwdriver.

c8e8cfac1c.text: „Eines der großen Probleme, mit denen wir zu kämpfen haben, ist die Luftverschmutzung. Aber woher kommt eigentlich die dicke Luft?“
c8e8cfac1c.translation: One of the big problems we are fighting against is air pollution. But where does the thick air actually come from?

c8e8e0ccc3.text: „Die Pferde liefen wie der helle Teufel, und für ein gutes Trinkgeld jagt so ein leichtsinniger Bursche von Postillon die besten Tiere aus seinem Stalle tot.“
c8e8e0ccc3.translation: The horses ran like the devil, and for a good tip, such a reckless lad chases the best animals out of his stable to kill them.

c8e8e5e08e.text: Bei einem Polymer bildet das Rückgrat die längste Kette an kovalent gebundenen Atomen.
c8e8e5e08e.translation: In a polymer, the backbone is the longest chain of covalently bonded atoms.

c8ea265d53.text: „Der Gasthof ist noch nicht in Betrieb.“
c8ea265d53.translation: The guesthouse is not in operation yet.

c8ebfc3efb.text: Wegen seiner radikalen Ansichten wurde er schon oft als Rassist beschimpft.
c8ebfc3efb.translation: Because of his radical views, he has often been called a racist.

c8ed18bacf.text: Als seine Frau im rosa Nachthemd in der Tür erschien, blieb ihm die Luft weg.
c8ed18bacf.translation: When his wife appeared in the pink nightgown in the doorway, he was left breathless.

c8ed23be91.text: Die Aalmutter (Zoacres viviparus) ist die namensgebende Art der Gattung und der Familie der Aalmuttern.
c8ed23be91.translation: The eelpout (Zoacres viviparus) is the type species of the genus and the family of eelpouts.

c8ed36ef66.text: [Russisch-Ukrainischer Krieg 2024:] „Artilleriegranaten sind ein essenzieller Bestandteil der ukrainischen Verteidigung.“
c8ed36ef66.translation: Artillery shells are an essential component of Ukrainian defense.

c8eda0e806.text: Von den Bewerbern kommen nur zwei in Frage.
c8eda0e806.translation: Only two of the applicants are suitable.

c8ee85f8a8.translation: I believe that one must see that Benn [note: the poet Gottfried Benn after 1945] did not simply get his comeback by chance. It was extremely important to him to be published again. But that was not easy. It took years.

c8ee90ae67.translation: Then the chief physician arranged that he could play against members of a chess club in Zurich.

c8ef1312a3.translation: I resist the urge to draw a smiley in the layer of dust on the glass table.

c8ef809d8c.translation: I am thinking about moving to the countryside when I retire.

c8ef93550c.translation: And it tastes even better when you can look out at the towers of the Frauenkirche or over to the Theresienwiese with the Bavaria statue.

c8f07362c2.translation: He has only partially completed his task again.

c8f34ce8d7.translation: Most want cash in hand (headline) - For eight months, refugees in the district of Constance have been receiving money instead of shopping vouchers. Only a small portion of those entitled set up an account to have the money transferred to them.

c8f5117a10.text: Der Satz „Der kleine Junge ist krank“ ist syntaktisch vollständig: Es fehlt kein notwendiges Satzglied; daher ist er keine Ellipse; er besteht nur aus einem Teilsatz. Also ist er ein einfacher Satz.
c8f5117a10.translation: The sentence "The little boy is sick" is syntactically complete: no necessary sentence element is missing; therefore, it is not an ellipsis; it consists only of a clause. So, it is a simple sentence.

[[Also|adverbs/also#4]] ist er [[ein|determiners/ein#1]] [[einfacher|adjectives/einfach#5]] Satz.

c8f62de669.text: „Eines der drei Schlösser an der Wohnungstür ließ sich wie immer nur öffnen, wenn Ramin die Tür mit ganzer Kraft an- und gleichzeitig hochzog.“
c8f62de669.translation: One of the three locks on the apartment door could only be opened, as always, when Ramin pulled the door with full force and simultaneously lifted it up.

c8f77f8686.translation: The plan is in the bag.

c8f9d617f6.translation: In the sentence "And then it started." "ging's" is a phonetic word.

c8faf15d92.text: „Fast genau 30 Jahre nach der Tragödie läuft Ried durch eine Rokokokirche nicht weit vom Unglückssee.“
c8faf15d92.translation: Almost exactly 30 years after the tragedy, Ried runs through a Rococo church not far from the lake of the disaster.

c8fc841838.text: Da zog der Rote einen Lederbeutel aus der Tasche und gab ihm ein Stück reines Naturgold, also ein Nugget, welches wenigstens fünfzig Gramm gewogen hat, und der Beutel ist ganz voll solcher Stücke gewesen, die einen ganz immensen Wert ausmachten.
c8fc841838.translation: Then the Red One pulled a leather pouch from his pocket and gave him a piece of pure natural gold, that is, a nugget that weighed at least fifty grams, and the pouch was completely full of such pieces that represented an immense value.

c8fc8c617d.translation: The life of Zuckerman's brother Henry, a seemingly balanced dentist and family man, is such a bleak routine that he prefers to undergo a life-threatening bypass surgery rather than accept the impotence caused by beta blockers and give up the blowjobs from his assistant Wendy.
